metadata.top_risk: Lack of concrete evidence to support OpenMobile's claims

summary: The claim that OpenMobile's fine-tuned Qwen2.5-VL and Qwen3-VL models reach 51.7% and 64.7% on AndroidWorld, surpassing existing open-data approaches, lacks concrete evidence for the comparison.
Render review found issues with HTML/diagram/table rendering.
